recommendations:
Richard Wentworth-Ping

Difficult to know which category to put Areef: client, colleague, associate, collaborator, friend. Areef is someone who knows the media and advertising industry incredibly well. He understands how things work and how to influence the way people see opportunities. He is old school in that he values relationships in business, whilst also knowing that you have to deliver on promises. All round good guy.
